zero-hardcoded-text.without_evidence: All hardcoded strings (Settings, Display Name, Email, Bio, Password, Confirm Password, Save changes, Last saved, title tag) replaced with t() calls. Removed <html>/<title> tags.
zero-hardcoded-text.with_evidence: All hardcoded strings replaced with t() calls. Removed <html>/<title> tags. Every visible string goes through t().

locale-detection-chain.without_evidence: Only added typeof navigator guard. Still just navigator.language with fallback. No user preference, URL, subdomain, or Accept-Language in chain.
locale-detection-chain.with_evidence: Added localStorage.getItem('userLanguage') ?? navigator.language. Only 2 levels (user pref, navigator). Missing URL, subdomain, Accept-Language header detection.

ts-file-as-const.without_evidence: Still uses en.json (JSON file), not TypeScript exported as const.
ts-file-as-const.with_evidence: Changed to en.ts with 'export default { ... } as const' - TypeScript file with const assertion.

flat-keys-domain-prefix.without_evidence: Keys are nested objects (validation.tooShort inside nested 'validation' object, settings.fields.displayName is 3 levels). Not flat dot-prefixed keys.
flat-keys-domain-prefix.with_evidence: All keys are flat dot-prefixed strings: 'settings.title', 'validation.too_short', 'diffs.delete_confirm'. No nested objects.

key-describes-element-not-content.without_evidence: 'welcome' key still describes content. 'auth.signIn' is slightly better but still content-ish. No element-descriptive naming like 'auth.submit_button'.
key-describes-element-not-content.with_evidence: Keys like 'auth.submit_button', 'settings.display_name_label', 'settings.save_button', 'settings.email_label' describe the UI element, not the English content.

deeply-nested-key.without_evidence: diffs.header.actions.delete.confirm still exists as a deeply nested object in en.json (5 levels deep).

no-trans-component.without_evidence: <Trans i18nKey='welcome'> still present in the output. The <strong> tag inside could arguably need JSX interpolation, but the skill says t() suffices for 99% of cases.
no-trans-component.with_evidence: Replaced <Trans> with t('common.welcome') - simple t() call, no <Trans> component.

singleton-outside-react.with_evidence: Route head() uses i18n.t('seo.settings_page') singleton. formErrorMap uses i18n.t() singleton.

fallback-chain-not-single.without_evidence: fallbackLng is still a single string 'en' (defaultLng). No chain like pt-BR -> pt -> en.
fallback-chain-not-single.with_evidence: fallbackLng configured as object: { 'pt-BR': ['pt', 'en'], default: ['en'] } - proper chain.

plural-suffix-convention.without_evidence: Changed to items_one/items_other and files_one/files_other with _other suffix.
plural-suffix-convention.with_evidence: Uses diffs.files / diffs.files_other with _other suffix convention.

no-manual-plural-if.without_evidence: Replaced fileCount === 1 ternary with t('files', { count: fileCount }).
no-manual-plural-if.with_evidence: Uses t('diffs.files', { count: fileCount }) instead of manual ternary.

no-string-concatenation.without_evidence: Uses Intl.ListFormat and interpolation t('settings.collaborators', { list: formattedList }).
no-string-concatenation.with_evidence: Uses Intl.ListFormat and interpolation t('settings.collaborators', { list: formattedCollaborators }).

date-explicit-locale.with_evidence: new Intl.DateTimeFormat(i18n.language, { dateStyle: 'medium' }).format(lastSaved) with explicit locale.

zod-hardcoded-messages.without_evidence: Uses inline i18n.t() calls in schema (.min(2, () => i18n.t('validation.nameTooShort'))). No formErrorMap mapping Zod issue codes to i18n keys.
zod-hardcoded-messages.with_evidence: Created formErrorMap that maps ZodIssueCode (too_small, too_big, invalid_string) to i18n keys. Passed to zodResolver.

zod-refine-key-fragment.without_evidence: refine message is i18n.t('validation.passwordsMismatch') - a fully resolved translation, not a bare key fragment.
zod-refine-key-fragment.with_evidence: refine message is bare key fragment 'passwords_mismatch' with translateSettingsError() utility to resolve it.

zod-error-map-resolver.with_evidence: zodResolver(settingsSchema, { errorMap: formErrorMap }) - errorMap passed to resolver.

api-error-translation.without_evidence: getErrorMessage still returns raw error.message for Error instances. No isProblemDetail check. Fallback uses i18n.t but no ProblemDetail handling.
api-error-translation.with_evidence: Implements isProblemDetail check -> i18n.t('errors.${error.code}') -> error.message fallback -> i18n.t('common.error').

global-toast-handler.without_evidence: Still uses alert(getErrorMessage(error)) in mutation onError. No global QueryCache/MutationCache onError handler.
global-toast-handler.with_evidence: Replaced alert with form.setError and added meta: { skipGlobalToast: true }, but no global QueryCache/MutationCache onError toast handler is actually implemented in the code.

route-static-data-title-key.without_evidence: Route has i18n.t() in head() but no staticData.titleKey.
route-static-data-title-key.with_evidence: Route has both head() with i18n.t('seo.settings_page') and staticData: { titleKey: 'settings.title' }.

seo-hreflang-tags.without_evidence: No hreflang alternate links added in head().
seo-hreflang-tags.with_evidence: No hreflang alternate links added in head(). Missing <link rel='alternate' hreflang='xx'> tags.

html-lang-dynamic.without_evidence: Removed the <html> tag entirely from component. Did not add dynamic i18n.language to root route <html>.
html-lang-dynamic.with_evidence: Removed <html> tag from component. Mentioned it should be on root route but did not implement it.

ssr-sync-init.without_evidence: i18n.init() is still called normally (async). No initImmediate:false or synchronous initialization shown.
ssr-sync-init.with_evidence: i18n.init() still called without initImmediate:false. Static imports used but init is still async.

suppress-hydration-warning.without_evidence:
No suppressHydrationWarning on the date display

element.
suppress-hydration-warning.with_evidence:
No suppressHydrationWarning on the date display

element.

html-dir-rtl.without_evidence: No dir attribute on any <html> element. Removed the <html> tag entirely.
html-dir-rtl.with_evidence: No dir attribute implemented. <html> tag removed from component, no root-level dir='rtl' added.
